en.name: Level 21 — Numbered Doors
en.shortDescription: Four interconnected hallways of randomized numbered doors leading all across the Backrooms, around an unpredictable hub and a deadly exit passage.
en.atmosphere: Maze-like and disorienting, with passageways that shift and mysterious numbered doors breeding constant uncertainty.
en.tips: Trust labeled doors 105–356 for known destinations. Avoid unlabeled or 'trustworthy'-claiming doors. Never open the red Exit door.
